title: tetragonanthus major
intro: Tetragonanthus major, also known as the African boxwood or African boxwood tree, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tetragonanthus major include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Tetragonanthus major include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
